settings.text: OUR SELECTIVE ROSTER OF ATHLETES, CREATORS & COACHES WHO HELP SHAPE THE FUTURE OF TITAN.

At Titan BattleGear, we align with athletes who define the next era of hockey. James Hagens is one of them.

Now officially drafted by the Boston Bruins, Hagens has already transitioned from elite prospect to proven winner on the biggest stages in the sport. His selection by one of the NHL’s most storied franchises was the natural next step for a player who has consistently delivered under pressure, against top competition, and on the international stage.

Before turning pro, Hagens built one of the most dominant junior resumes in recent history. After developing through the USA Hockey National Team Development Program, he announced himself globally at the IIHF U18 World Championship, where he recorded 22 points in seven games. That performance shattered a long standing tournament scoring record and cemented his reputation as a generational offensive talent.

Hagens followed that up with a gold medal run at the World Juniors, centering the top line for Team USA. Competing against the best young players in the world, he played a central role in Team USA’s championship run, combining elite playmaking, pace, and composure in the highest pressure moments the tournament offers.

Those traits are exactly why James Hagens is Titan BattleGear’s premier athlete. His game is built on speed, deception, edge work, and relentless compete level. That demands equipment that does not compromise protection, comfort, or performance. Titan exists to meet that standard. When Hagens steps on the ice wearing Titan, it is a direct reflection of our mission to engineer the safest, most advanced protective apparel in hockey.

James Hagens represents the future of the game.

Titan BattleGear exists to protect it.

Together, we conquer.

We’re not here to blend in. We’re here to lead. Titan BattleGear is for the relentless, the fearless, the game-changers.

Titan Ambassadors don’t just believe in protection -  they stand behind it. Players, parents, and coaches who demand gear that keeps up with the game. 

Because performance isn’t optional - and protection is non-negotiable.

TITAN COMMUNITY: For athletes, parents & coaches who want to stay connected, get perks, and join the fun.

TITAN FIRST LINE: Our selective roster of elite athletes, creators & coaches who help shape the future of Titan.

The Titan BattleGear Brand Ambassador Program aims to empower young athletes and parents to become the voice and face of our revolutionary brand.

Our ambassadors champion safety, innovation, and performance, spreading the Titan BattleGear ethos throughout the hockey community.

settings.heading: 3. Product
settings.text: Influence future product development, and be a part of the innovation that makes Titan the safest, most advanced product in the game.

The Titan Community is more than an ambassador program - it’s a united force.An army of athletes, parents, coaches, and supporters standing together to change how protection is viewed in the game.

We built Titan because too many plaWWyers are still being asked to play faster, stronger, and more physical without protection that has kept pace. The Titan Community exists to challenge that status quo, raise awareness, shift expectations, and demand better for today’s athletes.

This is where belief turns into action.

What community members do:

  • Help spread awareness about the importance of proper protection
  • Share Titan’s mission with teammates, families, and communities
  • Support a new standard for safety in the game

What community members receive:

  • Early access to product announcements and first looks
  • Invitations to challenges, giveaways, and brand missions
  • Seasonal perks and special offers
  • Exclusive Titan discounts to share with family and friends
  • Opportunities to be featured on Titan social media channels
  • Opportunities to be considered for the future Front Line, our invite only elite program invitations

Who can join:
All ages can apply.  We look for athletes, creators, parents, and coaches who are active on social, engaged with their community, and genuinely aligned with Titan’s mission.

The Titan Community is more than an ambassador program - it’s a united force. An army of athletes, parents, coaches, and supporters standing together to change how protection is viewed in the game.

We built Titan because too many players are still being asked to play faster, stronger, and more physical without protection that has kept pace. The Titan Community exists to challenge that status quo, raise awareness, shift expectations, and demand better for today’s athletes.

This is where belief turns into action.

What community members do:

  • Help spread awareness about the importance of proper protection
  • Share Titan’s mission with teammates, families, and communities
  • Support a new standard for safety in the game

What community members receive:

  • Early access to product announcements and first looks
  • Invitations to challenges, giveaways, and brand missions
  • Seasonal perks and special offers
  • Exclusive Titan discounts to share with family and friends
  • Opportunities to be featured on Titan social media channels
  • Opportunities to be considered for the future Front Line, our invite only elite program invitations

Who can join:
All ages can apply.  We look for athletes, creators, parents, and coaches who are active on social, engaged with their community, and genuinely aligned with Titan’s mission.

The Titan Community Program is open to all athletes, parents, creators, and fans who love Titan and want insider access to product news, challenges, and exclusive perks - without any posting requirements.

Community members get early product announcements, fun brand missions, giveaways, and special Titan discounts to share with family and friends. It’s a great way to stay close to the brand and be part of the energy, whether you're a player, parent, or supporter.

This tier is also a stepping-stone toward the Front Line for those who want to deepen their involvement later on.

Community members receive:

  • Early access to product announcements and first looks
  • Invitations to challenges, giveaways, and brand missions
  • Seasonal perks and special offers
  • Exclusive Titan discounts to share with family and friends
  • Opportunities to be featured on Titan social media channels
  • Opportunities to be considered for future Front Line invitations

Who can join: Open to all ages.

Our selective roster of athletes, creators & coaches who help shape the future of Titan.

The Titan FirstLine is our premium partnership tier - a curated group of athletes, creators, and coaches who represent Titan at the highest level. First Line members get early access to new gear, influence product development through direct feedback, and take part in special opportunities to be featured across our brand.

This program is built on collaboration, authenticity, and shared passion for the sport. Members also receive earning opportunities, but the heart of the program is the relationship, not the transaction.

First Line members receive:

  • Early access to new protective gear and Rinkwear drops
  • Input into product testing, design insights, and feedback sessions
  • Priority selection for product seeding
  • Opportunities to be featured across Titan marketing channels
  • Invitations to exclusive challenges, incentives, and brand moments
  • Access to earning opportunities

Who can apply: Applicants must be 13+ (under 18 requires parental consent). We look for elite athletes, creators, and coaches who are very active on social, highly engaged with their community, and genuinely aligned with Titan’s mission.

1. Evangelize the Brand: Represent Titan BattleGear with pride and enthusiasm, embodying our core values and mission.
  2. Promote Products: Actively use and promote Titan BattleGear products in games, practices, and events.
  3. Social Media Engagement: Share experiences, reviews, and content on social media platforms, tagging Titan BattleGear and using designated hashtags.
  4. Community Involvement: Participate in local hockey events, clinics, and youth programs, wearing Titan BattleGear and promoting our brand.
  5. Content Creation: Produce high-quality content such as photos, videos, and blog posts showcasing Titan BattleGear products and their benefits.
  6. Feedback and Development: Provide regular feedback on products and participate in product development initiatives.

1. Passion for Hockey: Demonstrated love for the game and commitment to its growth and safety.
  2. Influence and Reach: Strong social media presence and ability to engage with a wide audience.
  3. Authenticity: Genuine use and belief in Titan BattleGear products.
  4. Leadership: Ability to inspire and lead by example, both on and off the ice.
  5. Community Engagement: Active involvement in local hockey programs and events.

settings.heading: Ella Huntley
settings.text: Ella Huntley is a standout defenseman playing Division 1 hockey at Boston University. Originally from Buffalo, NY, Ella sharpened her game with the Buffalo Regals in the boys SCTA loop in Canada, building a reputation for grit and elite skill from a young age. Her journey reflects pure dedication and a fearless approach — perfectly aligned with Titan BattleGear’s mission to protect and empower the game’s boldest players.

settings.heading: Axton Kohut-Hunt
settings.text: Axton Kohut-Hunt is a rising force in elite hockey, known for his relentless work ethic and natural leadership. The former Captain of Spartan Academy AAA (finishing the season with 67 points), Axton now plays for the Calgary Rockies JPHL Academy U14 Prep team. He’s earned invites to major events like the Chowder Cup in Boston (with the Boston Jr. Whalers), the CCM Invitational, and the World Selects Invitational in Finland, and was the first-overall pick at the NHL Kids Tournament in Montreal. With a reputation for pushing limits and leading by example, Axton embodies the fearless spirit of Titan BattleGear — always striving to set the standard on and off the ice.

settings.heading: Alex Wolanski
settings.text: Alex is a fwd 2011 AAA for the Elite Mid Fairfield team.

settings.heading: Nico Giannetti
settings.text: Nico Giannetti is a skilled young forward playing AAA hockey for the Chicago Mission Peewee Minor. A dedicated athlete and student, Nico balances hockey with life at Catholic school and enjoys all sports — but hockey is his true passion. Fluent in English and Hungarian, he brings a global perspective to the rink and loves traveling to Europe to connect with his roots. Off the ice, Nico is an animal lover with two dogs and an infectious energy that makes him a natural leader among the next generation of Titan athletes.

settings.heading: Gino Giannetti
settings.text: Gino Giannetti is an energetic young forward for the Chicago Blues, known for his love of the game and big personality on and off the ice. At just 11 years old, Gino is already building a strong community through his YouTube channel and social media, sharing his hockey journey and inspiring other young players to get out and play. With a passion for creating content and a fearless approach on the ice, Gino perfectly embodies the next generation of Titan athletes.

settings.heading: Logan Rich
settings.text: Logan Rich is a standout multi-sport athlete playing Bantam Major AAA hockey with Team Maryland. A straight-A student and principal’s honor roll regular, Logan balances hockey, major travel baseball, and music — including piano, saxophone, and trombone. On the ice, he’s a dynamic competitor who prioritizes safety without sacrificing performance, making Titan BattleGear his gear of choice. With a growing YouTube presence and a drive to lead by example, Logan represents the next generation of fearless, versatile Titan athletes.

settings.heading: Shaden Gower
settings.text: Shaden Gower is a dedicated young forward entering his first year of U13 hockey with the JDF Grizzlies. On skates almost as soon as he could walk, Shaden is known for his relentless work ethic — from hours on the ice with training academies to daily driveway shooting sessions at home. Off the ice, he shares his journey on his growing YouTube channel (@mullethockey), inspiring other young players to push their limits. Shaden lives by a favorite quote from NHL legend Martin St. Louis, who once said he wasn’t the best skater, stickhandler, or shooter — but he was “the best at getting better.” A true role model with a big heart, Shaden embodies everything Titan BattleGear stands for.
